title: The Chart Mistake Making Stakeholders Ignore You
description: No context = invisible analysis. Title should state the finding, not the variable. #Shorts #DataScience #Python #DataVisualization
hook_visual: Screen recording of a chart titled 'Revenue Over Time' — quick cut to the same chart retitled 'Revenue Grew 23% After Q3 Pricing Change' — text overlay reads: 'This is why no one responds to your dashboards'
end_screen_cta: Subscribe for the full tutorial — link in bio
